notableEvents.label: Nick Fortes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Fortes grounds out, shortstop José Caballero to first baseman Ben Rice.

notableEvents.label: Ben Williamson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ben Williamson singles on a ground ball to right fielder Amed Rosario. Jake Fraley to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Nick Fortes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Fortes grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Ben Rice. Taylor Walls out at 2nd. Nick Fortes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nick Fortes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Fortes grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Ben Rice. Taylor Walls out at 2nd. Nick Fortes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nick Fortes rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Fortes grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Ben Rice. Taylor Walls out at 2nd. Nick Fortes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Giancarlo Stanton pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Giancarlo Stanton grounds out, second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Aaron Judge scores. Cody Bellinger to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Austin Wells pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Austin Wells lines out sharply to left fielder Chandler Simpson.

notableEvents.label: José Caballero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: José Caballero grounds into a double play, third baseman Junior Caminero to second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Ryan McMahon out at 2nd. José Caballero out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Mason Englert intentionally walks Austin Wells.
